## Summary

Describe the requested feature.

## Use Case

Who needs this, and what will they do with it?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior or command.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround or alternate approach.

## Additional Context

Add examples, links, or constraints if useful.
